zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay於1126年9月11日出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯時，他的父親Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs44歲，母親Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France33歲。他於1150年與Isabelle de Courtenay在英國戴文奧可哈普頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1183年4月10日在巴勒斯坦享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay于1126年9月11日出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯时，他的父亲Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs44岁，母亲Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France33岁。他于1150年与Isabelle de Courtenay在英国戴文奧可哈普頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1183年4月10日在巴勒斯坦享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay was born on 11 September 1126, in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, was 44 and his mother, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, was 33. He married Isabelle de Courtenay in 1150, in Okehampton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 10 April 1183, in Palestine, at the age of 56, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay est né le 11 septembre 1126, à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Courtenay en 1150, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1183, à Palestine, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay am 11. September 1126 in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs 44 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France 33. Er hat 1150 in Okehampton, Devon, England Isabelle de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1183 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay è nato il il 11 settembre 1126 nel Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Courtenay nel 1150, nel Okehampton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1183, nel Palestina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre Ier de France-Courtenayが1126年9月11日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズで生まれた時，父Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francsは44歳，母Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de Franceは33歳であった。1150年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンでIsabelle de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1183年4月10日にパレスチナで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay(이)가 1126년 9월 11일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1150년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 Isabelle de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 4월 10일 팔레스타인에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay nasceu em 11 de setembro de 1126, em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Courtenay em 1150, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1183, em Palestina, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay родился 11 сентября 1126 г. в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Courtenay в 1150 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 10 апреля 1183 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre Ier de France-Courtenay nació el 11 de septiembre de 1126, en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Courtenay en 1150, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1183, en Palestina, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
